title: Infosys Unveils AI-First Fan and Accessibility Experiences for Australian Open 2026
detailed_summary: Infosys announced new AI-enabled experiences for Australian Open 2026 under its partnership with Tennis Australia, powered by Infosys Topaz. The announcement highlights MatchFeel for visually impaired fans, Rally as an interactive AI mascot, and Keys to the Match for fan insights. No financial terms, revenue impact, contract value, or material business update were disclosed.

key_facts.fact: Infosys unveiled its latest innovations for Australian Open 2026, powered by Infosys Topaz.

key_facts.fact: The announcement builds on an eight-year partnership with Tennis Australia.
